text:
Created attachment 185824
src/llvm_wrapper/llvm_wrapper.cpp (preprocessed, compressed)

$ pkg install llvm40 cmake sdl2 git
$ cd /tmp
$ git clone https://github.com/programmerjake/vulkan-cpu
$ cd vulkan-cpu
$ cmake .
$ make
[...]
